problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Piezoelectric. Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
